Variable.name: identityName
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: name of the Identity provisioned against

Variable.name: primaryEmail
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: the provisioned primaryEmail

Variable.name: ea40
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: determined ea40 value for provisioned user

Variable.name: ntAccountName
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: determined ntAccountName of the provisioned user

Variable.name: ea6
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: determined ea6 value for provisioned user

Variable.name: targetApp
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: target AD application for these operations

Variable.name: targetDN
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: target AD DN for these operations

Variable.name: samAccountName
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: samAccountName of the provisioned user

Variable.name: prefix
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: prefix of the provisioned primaryEmail

Variable.name: suffix
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: suffix of the provisioned primaryEmail

Variable.name: orgUnitPath
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: orgUnitPath of the provisioned user

Variable.name: targetConflict
Variable.Description: Passed in by GSuite AfterProvisioning Rule: determines if exception will be thrown due to email/mail misalignment with target AD link

Script.Source:
import sailpoint.tools.GeneralException;
throw new GeneralException("Email already set on Identity does not match mail currently set on target AD link (" + ntAccountName + "). Automated GSuite AfterProvisioning forcibly terminated to avoid data pollution. Manual action required to resolve.");

import sailpoint.tools.GeneralException;
throw new GeneralException("Potential Upn Conflict on target AD. Automated GSuite AfterProvisioning forcibly terminated to avoid data pollution.");
